race_meta.race_name: Bar 1 Betting Leinster National Handicap Chase (Listed)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed goraibhmaithagat at position 3 (19.0% probability) vs top pick Uhavemeinstitches (24.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~5.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Uhavemeinstitches > Chosen Witness, but actual result was Goraibhmaithagat > Uhavemeinstitches. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Goraibhmaithagat had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -3.2%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
